name: SeaTags - BETA
description: Tags Seanime's own Extensions cards (Installed & Marketplace) with their community status (Working / Broken / Deprecated) and lets you filter by it — pulled from the Seanime-Marketplace tag list.
author: aquaryuo

networkAccess.reasoning: Reads the community marketplace tag list (Working/Broken/Deprecated) from raw.githubusercontent.com so it can tag and filter the Extensions cards by their reported status.
